name: AI Customer Support
tagline: 24/7 intelligent customer support across every channel
description: AI-powered customer support platform with multi-channel routing across email, Telegram, and web chat. Three specialized AI agents handle triage, resolution, and escalation, ensuring fast response times and consistent service quality. Integrates with your existing knowledge base and CRM for context-aware responses.
prerequisites: Active email domain with IMAP/SMTP access
